name: Insider Threat
description: After-hours break-the-glass access by a known employee without clinical justification. Accessing records of co-workers or VIP patients.

anomaly.description: Employee accessing records of co-workers and VIP patients after hours via break-the-glass
indicators: Break-the-glass on patients not in employee's department
No active orders or recent encounters with accessed patients
Sequential access pattern suggesting browsing rather than clinical need
